errors.description: The Merkle inclusion proof is missing a canonical leaf hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny inclusion verification until the target leaf hash is present

errors.description: The Merkle inclusion proof leaf index is malformed or outside the checkpoint range.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny inclusion verification until the leaf index is valid

errors.description: The Merkle inclusion proof sibling path is malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny inclusion verification until the sibling path is canonical

errors.description: The Merkle inclusion proof does not reconstruct the checkpoint root.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny inclusion verification until leaf-to-root integrity is proven

errors.description: The Merkle inclusion proof does not bind to the expected checkpoint.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny inclusion verification until checkpoint binding is proven

errors.description: The Merkle inclusion proof contains unsafe diagnostics or redaction-sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny inclusion verification until no secrets or raw approvals are present
